name: 3pc Room Spray and Diffuser with Aloe and Bergamot Candle Gift Set - Threshold™
description:
Create a soothing ambiance with the 3pc Room Spray and Diffuser with Aloe and Bergamot Candle Gift Set from Threshold™. This set includes a room spray, a reed diffuser and a scented candle with a 20-hour burn time, all infused with the calming aroma of aloe with notes of bergamot. Crafted with a blend of paraffin and palm wax, the candle offers a gentle, long-lasting glow, while the diffuser and spray provide continuous freshness.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you™
